# Gold Hands Miami — Professional Handyman Services

> Gold Hands Miami is a fully insured handyman service company based in Sunny Isles Beach, Florida, serving the entire Miami-Dade County area.

## Business Summary
- **Name:** Gold Hands Miami
- **Type:** Professional Handyman & Home Repair Services
- **Location:** 201 178th Dr, Sunny Isles Beach, FL 33160
- **Service Area:** Miami-Dade County — Miami, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Brickell, Doral, Hialeah, Sunny Isles Beach, Aventura, Hollywood, Fort Lauderdale
- **Phone:** +1 (737) 530-8110
- **Email:** handymangoldhands@gmail.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Sunday 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- **Established:** 2024
- **Insurance:** Fully insured (General Liability $1M+), all technicians background-checked

## Services & Starting Prices
1. General Handyman Services — from $79 (shelving, repairs, assembly, maintenance)
2. TV Mounting — from $89 (wall-mount installation, cable management, any TV size)
3. Furniture Assembly — from $99 (IKEA, Wayfair, Amazon — all brands)
4. Drywall Repair — from $149 (holes, cracks, water damage, seamless finish)
5. Painting (Interior & Exterior) — from $299 (accent walls, full rooms, exteriors)
6. Light Fixture & Ceiling Fan Installation — from $79 (code-compliant)
7. Smart Home Installation — from $99 (thermostats, doorbells, cameras, smart locks)
8. Minor Plumbing — from $99 (faucets, toilets, garbage disposal, fixtures)
9. Minor Electrical — from $79 (outlets, switches, GFCI upgrades)

## Key Facts
- Same-day service available
- Free estimates for all services
- 100% satisfaction guarantee
- 2-hour minimum for hourly jobs
- Standard rate: $80/hour
- All technicians are background-checked and insured
- Service available in English and Spanish

## How to Book
- Call: (737) 530-8110
- Email: handymangoldhands@gmail.com
- Website contact form: https://goldhandsmia.com/#contact

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: What areas do you serve?
A: We serve all of Miami-Dade County including Miami, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Brickell, Doral, Hialeah, Sunny Isles Beach, Aventura, and surrounding areas.

Q: Are your technicians insured?
A: Yes. We carry full General Liability insurance ($1M+) and every technician passes a background check before joining our team.

Q: Do you offer same-day service?
A: Yes, we offer same-day appointments when available. Call us at (737) 530-8110 for immediate scheduling.

Q: What is your pricing?
A: Our standard rate is $80/hour with a 2-hour minimum. Many services have flat-rate pricing starting from $79. We provide free estimates with no hidden fees.

Q: Do you offer a warranty?
A: Yes, all work comes with a satisfaction guarantee. If there is any issue, we will make it right.
